results.rendered_html:
ava-√kṛṣ -karṣati (ind.p. -kṛṣya; once [ MBh. xiii, 5007 ] Pass. Opt. -kṛṣyeta in the sense of P. or Ā.) to draw off or away, take off (as a garment or wreath, &c.),  MBh.  &c.;
to turn off, remove,  KātyŚr. ;
to drag down (see avakṛṣṭa below);
to entice, allure,  Kād.
